steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that biophilic design incorporates organic or biomorphic forms and textures to establish a relationship between building and nature. The word therefore signals that the blank should explain why curves fit this design approach.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Since biomorphic means life-like, curves are a logical choice because they resemble the arcing and contours found in plants and animals—they mirror the natural forms that biophilic design seeks to incorporate. The other choices either describe curves as generally common in architecture without this connection to nature (B), invoke a practicality-versus-aesthetics trade-off the passage doesn't discuss (C), or contradict the goal of establishing coherence between building and nature (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
